description.en: A rare bird known for its dark brown body and striking white 「ears」 made of feathers.
description.zh: 一种罕见的鸟类，因其深褐色的身体和引人注目的白色羽毛「耳朵」而闻名。

anatomy.en: They have beautiful white tail feathers that curve like a horse's tail and red skin around their eyes.
anatomy.zh: 它们拥有美丽的白色尾羽，像马尾一样弯曲，眼周有红色的皮肤。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They prefer walking to flying. They use their strong claws to dig for roots and insects on the forest floor.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们更喜欢行走而不是飞行。它们用强壮的爪子在森林地面挖掘根茎和昆虫。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Endemic to the mountain forests of northern China, especially Shanxi and Hebei provinces.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 中国北部山地森林特有种，特别是山西和河北省。
